name: Outstanding Fines Summary
query:
SELECT
  lm.name AS `Member:Link/Library Member:140`,
  lm.member_name AS `Member Name:Data:200`,
  lm.member_type AS `Type:Data:100`,
  lm.email AS `Email:Data:180`,
  COALESCE(SUM(f.amount), 0) AS `Outstanding:Currency:140`,
  COUNT(f.name) AS `Unpaid Fines:Int:120`
FROM `tabLibrary Member` lm
LEFT JOIN `tabFine` f
  ON f.member = lm.name AND f.docstatus = 1 AND f.status = 'Unpaid'
GROUP BY lm.name
HAVING `Outstanding` > 0
ORDER BY `Outstanding` DESC
